hook.summary: Fast-paced block placement with glowing highlights and 'These weird blocks>>' text.
hook.visual_action: Wooden blocks are being placed rapidly into a grid, completing lines that glow and disappear.

scene_flow: Rapid block placement and line clearing with glowing effects.
Montage of high-score achievements with positive feedback overlays and voiceover.
Showcase of different puzzle themes and skins including stone and dark wood.
Final end card with game logo and play button.
on_screen_text: This game is perfect for killing boredom
Easy to solve but hard to get high score
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts looking for a relaxing and satisfying time-killer.
